mapper.select: SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI:SS') AS OPEN_DATE , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , MOVIE_STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE ORDER BY MOVIE_ID ASC

SELECT MOVIE_ID , POSTER_URL , TITLE , MOVIE_RATING , TO_CHAR(OPEN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI:SS') AS OPEN_DATE , OPEN_COUNTRY , RUNNING_TIME , INTRODUCE , SYNOPSIS , ORIGINAL_TITLE , MOVIE_STATE , LANGUAGE , BUDGET , PROFIT FROM MOVIE WHERE MOVIE_ID = #{articleId}
